tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file from the sandbox

filename.description: Name of the file to read

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write or create a file in the sandbox with given content

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Permanently delete a file from the sandbox

filename.description: Name of the file to delete

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List all files currently in the sandbox
